metadata.title: GEO Compass — AI Brand Rankings
metadata.description: Track your brand's ranking in AI answers (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini...) and steer your GEO visibility.

login.title: Welcome
login.subtitle: Sign in to access your AI brand rankings dashboard.

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Sign up to access your AI brand rankings dashboard.

dashboard.title: Rankings
dashboard.subtitle: Results for today
dashboard.nextResult: Results are updated every day at 2AM
dashboard.addPrompt: To get started, add a prompt in the dedicated section.

funding.donationsDescription: GEO Compass runs on donations. The AI models used are as low-cost as possible for now — €0.50 can keep several users running for weeks. Donations cover server maintenance and may one day fund a dedicated domain name.
funding.apiKeyDescription: You can enter your own OpenRouter API key below. The site will then run on your personal credits, without drawing from the shared budget.

emailNotifications.label: Email notifications
emailNotifications.description: Receive email notifications about your ranking results.

deleteAccount.dialogDescription: Warning, this action is irreversible. You will no longer be able to access your account and your data will be permanently deleted.
deleteAccount.confirm: I want to delete my account

modelSelection.title: AI model selection
modelSelection.description: Choose which AI models to query for your analyses — GPT-4o, Gemini, Claude, Mistral, and more.

emailAlerts.title: Daily email alerts
emailAlerts.description: Receive a morning digest of your brand ranking changes straight to your inbox.

prompts.title: Prompts
prompts.description: Create your prompts below. Every day, they are automatically submitted to each AI model and results are updated.
prompts.empty: No prompts yet. Add one above.
prompts.stats: {activeCount} active · {totalCount} total — queried against every selected model

form.label: Prompt
form.placeholder: What are the best running shoes for marathon training?

publisher.heading: Site publisher
publisher.body: This website is published by Lucas Berthet, acting as a private individual (non-professional publisher).
publisher.addressNotice: In accordance with Article 6-III of the French LCEN (Loi pour la Confiance dans l'Économie Numérique), a non-professional publisher is not required to make their postal address public. This address has been provided to the hosting provider and can be disclosed to the competent judicial authorities upon request.

hosting.heading: Hosting provider
hosting.body: This website is hosted by Vercel Inc., 340 S Lemon Ave #4133, Walnut, CA 91789, USA.

ip.heading: Intellectual property
ip.body: The GEO Compass name, logo, and all content on this site (texts, graphics, code) are the property of their respective author unless otherwise stated. Any reproduction, representation, or use without prior authorization is prohibited.

liability.heading: Liability
liability.body: The publisher strives to provide accurate information but cannot guarantee it is exhaustive, complete, or up to date. Use of this site is at the user's own risk.

intro.heading: Purpose
intro.body: These Terms of Service govern access to and use of GEO Compass, a service that tracks a brand's ranking in AI-generated answers (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and other models). By creating an account or using the service, you agree to these terms.

account.heading: Account and access
account.body: Access to GEO Compass requires creating an account. You are responsible for the confidentiality of your credentials and for all activity under your account.

usage.heading: Use of the service
usage.body: GEO Compass is provided on a best-effort basis. The service may evolve, be temporarily unavailable, or be discontinued without prior notice. Rankings are generated from third-party AI model outputs and are provided for informational purposes only.

liability.heading: Liability
liability.body: GEO Compass cannot be held liable for decisions made based on the rankings or data provided by the service, nor for the availability or accuracy of third-party AI models it queries.

ip.heading: Intellectual property
ip.body: All elements of the GEO Compass service (brand, interface, code) remain the property of their author. Users retain ownership of the prompts and data they submit.

changes.heading: Changes to these terms
changes.body: These Terms of Service may be updated at any time. Continued use of the service after a change constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

law.heading: Governing law
law.body: These Terms of Service are governed by French law. Any dispute shall be submitted to the competent French courts.
